title: FREE Spanish-Speaking Children's Engagement Group

blocks.title: Spanish-Speaking Children’s Engagement Group Children 8 years old and younger
blocks.logistics:
When: Fridays in person from 5-6:30pm

Dates: May 1, 8, 15, 22, 29 and 6/5 2026

Price: Free

Where: In person at Growth Journey

2201 Pennsylvania Ave., Suite 101 Philadelphia, PA 19130

blocks.heading: Group will be conducted in Spanish with a bilingual therapist
items: Social skills development and making friends
Play-based learning and structured peer interaction
Emotional regulation and coping with big feelings
Creative activities including drawing, games, and guided play
Learning routines, listening skills, and following directions
Psychoeducation through age-appropriate learning, including early ABCs and foundational skills
Support for children with learning differences and developmental needs
Welcoming children with autism and ABA-related support needs
Safe opportunities to practice peer engagement, teamwork, and emotional expression

blocks.heading: Group will be facilitated by Growth Journey bilingual therapist
blocks.body:
Open to all Spanish-speaking NSC clients who are 8 years old or younger
All immigration statuses are welcome!

Register by emailing Gwen Soffer at gsoffer@nscphila.org

excerpt: A free, play-based group for Spanish-speaking children 8 and younger to build social skills, confidence, and friendships with a bilingual therapist.
seoDescription: Free Spanish-speaking children's engagement group for kids 8 and younger in Philadelphia. Play-based social, emotional, and communication skills with a bilingual therapist.
